holdings.infoBox: TCHI is an equity ETF with a total of 196 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lenovo Group stock at 4.68%, NetEase at 4.53%, Tencent Holdings at 4.00%, JD.com at 3.60%, and Xiaomi at 3.46%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI China Multisector Tech ETF (TCHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Chinese equities in technology and technology-related industries. TCHI was launched on Jan 25, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI China Technology Sub-Industries Select Capped Index
